title: bridge.result
description: What the sidecar returns to the desktop. Fail-closed + VERIFIED-receipt-mandatory: `result` is non-null ONLY when `ok` is true and a `receipt` with `verified: true` is present; a failure never carries a result. `verified` is set by the adapter only after an injected verifier confirms the run's signed evidence.

result.description: The AI turn's output. Non-null iff ok=true.

verified.description: True only after the injected verifier confirmed the run's signed evidence. `ok: true` REQUIRES `verified: true`; the adapter never returns a result otherwise.

receipt.description: The governed-run receipt (from bro_supervisor.SupervisorResult), verified. Mandatory (with verified:true) alongside any result.
